games.title: Rollerdrome
games.description:
Rollerdrome is a BAFTA award-winning third person action shooter that seamlessly blends high octane, visceral combat with fluid movement and tricking mechanics into one complementary and challenging whole, to create an original adrenaline-pumping shooter experience like no other.


Reviews
“One of the best to ever do it. Rollerdrome is an action showstopper”
94/100 – PC Gamer

“Amazing”
9/10 – IGN

“Holysh*t what a video game!”
Skill Up

games.title: Monster Hunter Rise + Sunbreak
games.description:
Unleash Your Inner Hunter in Monster Hunter Rise!
Embark on an epic hunting adventure in Monster Hunter Rise, the acclaimed action RPG that challenges you to become the ultimate monster hunter. Explore vibrant landscapes, master diverse weapons, and face formidable creatures in this thrilling installment of the top-selling Monster Hunter series. The PC version boasts optimized graphics and performance, delivering a truly immersive monster hunting experience.

Face Ferocious Monsters Inspired by Japanese Folklore
Prepare to confront a diverse roster of ferocious monsters, each possessing unique behaviors and deadly attacks. From returning classics to new beasts inspired by Japanese folklore, including the flagship wyvern Magnamalo, you'll need to adapt your hunting strategies and exploit their weaknesses to survive and reap valuable rewards.

Master 14 Unique Weapon Types
Choose from 14 distinct weapon types, each offering a different playstyle. Unleash devastating blows with the Great Sword, execute elegant strikes with the Long Sword, or become a whirlwind of blades with the Dual Blades. Whether you prefer close-quarters combat or ranged attacks with Bows and Bowguns, you'll find the perfect weapon to match your preferred monster hunting style.

Hunt, Gather, and Craft Your Way to Victory
Every monster you conquer yields valuable materials used to craft and upgrade your weapons and armor. Continuously improve your gear to take on even more challenging hunts and earn greater rewards. The ability to change your weapon at any time opens up limitless possibilities for customizing your hunter and conquering any challenge.

Team Up or Solo: The Choice is Yours!
The Hunter Hub provides thrilling multiplayer quests where up to four players can collaborate to tackle formidable targets. Difficulty scaling ensures a fair fight whether you embark on solo hunts or join forces with a full squad. Experience the thrill of cooperative monster hunting!

Stunning Visuals and PC Optimizations
Immerse yourself in the visually stunning world of Monster Hunter Rise with support for up to 4K resolution, HDR, ultrawide monitors, and an unlocked frame rate. Enjoy optimized performance and beautiful graphics, creating a truly captivating action RPG experience. Plus, gain immediate access to free title updates including new monsters, quests, gear, and more to keep the hunt exciting.

Unravel a Captivating Storyline in Kamura Village
Discover a rich narrative set in the serene Kamura Village, where villagers live in fear of the Rampage, a catastrophic event where hordes of monsters attack. Fifty years after the last Rampage, you must join forces with the villagers to face this impending threat and protect their home in this exciting action RPG adventure.

Master the Wirebug for Enhanced Mobility and Combat
The Wirebug is an essential tool for every hunter. Use its silk to zip across maps, scale walls, and execute unique attacks specific to each weapon type. This innovative mechanic adds a new layer of verticality and strategy to your monster hunting experience.

Companions by Your Side: Palicoes and Palamutes
The returning Palico Felyne companions are joined by the all-new Palamute Canyne companions! These loyal buddies provide invaluable support during hunts, offering assistance in combat and exploration.

Control Monsters with Wyvern Riding
Turn the tables on your prey by controlling raging monsters with Wyvern Riding! Unleash their power to deal massive damage to your enemies and dominate the battlefield.

Defend Kamura Village in The Rampage
Prepare for an unprecedented challenge in The Rampage, a new quest type where you must defend Kamura Village from relentless hordes of monsters. Experience monster hunting on an epic scale and test your skills against overwhelming odds!

Monster Hunter Rise: Sunbreak - A New Hunting Horizon Awaits!
Expand your Monster Hunter Rise experience with the massive Sunbreak expansion! Embark on a thrilling new adventure filled with ferocious monsters, exciting new locales, and enhanced hunting action. Master new combat techniques and uncover a dark secret threatening a faraway kingdom. Get ready for the ultimate action RPG challenge!

Explore a Distant Land
As the "Fierce Flame of Kamura," your legend precedes you. Now, you must set sail from Kamura Village to investigate a terrifying new threat looming over a kingdom across the sea. Prepare for an epic journey into the unknown!

Face New and Returning Monster Threats
Arrive at Elgado Outpost and confront the source of the kingdom's woes: the fearsome Three Lords - Malzeno, Lunagaron, and Garangolm. These terrifying new monsters are just the beginning. Brace yourself as classic monsters from previous Monster Hunter titles return, making this a true test of your hunting skills!

Enhanced Hunting Gameplay with the Wirebug
The beloved Wirebug returns, now more versatile than ever! Discover exhilarating new abilities for all 14 weapon types, adding unprecedented depth and flexibility to your hunting style. Master the enhanced mobility and strategic options to overcome the most challenging hunts in this action-packed game.

Meet a Colorful Cast of Characters
Elgado Outpost is teeming with memorable characters, each with their own unique personalities and stories. Interact with these vibrant locals, aid them in their quests, and rely on their assistance as you navigate the dangers ahead. Forge bonds and uncover secrets as you progress through the narrative in this expansive hunting RPG.

Please Note: You must own Monster Hunter Rise to play this expansion. Sunbreak content becomes accessible after completing the 7-star Hub quest "Serpent Goddess of Thunder." Restart the game if you purchase this content while the game is running.
